document_srl.description: Global post id parsed from title link href /hot/{srl}; query string stripped

board_post_no.description: Board-local number from td.no; descending, tiebreaker only

title.sanitization: replace real titles with synthetic placeholders in fixtures

board.description: Collection surface; origin board (e.g. square) only visible on detail page

rank.description: 1-based position among normal rows: page_index*20 + row_index+1; no explicit rank field on site

time_text.description: Raw td.time text: 'HH:MM' for same-day, 'MM.DD' for older; year absent

published_at.description: Resolved from time_text against collected_at; null when ambiguous

comment_count.description: Parsed from a.replyNum; 0 when the anchor is absent

recommend_count.description: NOT exposed on public list surfaces; always null in list fixtures

has_images.description: Presence of fa-images icon in title cell

envelope_schema.items: array of item_schema, max 20 per page
envelope_schema.notices_skipped: integer, count of tr.notice rows excluded

sanitization_rules: Fixture titles must be synthetic (no real post titles, usernames, or quoted content)
document_srl and board_post_no in fixtures must be synthetic but format-realistic (10-digit srl, 6-digit post no)
No comment text, author identifiers, or post body content in fixtures
parsing_notes: Skip tr.notice rows (event/permanent notices) before ranking
Strip '?page=N' query from title link href before extracting document_srl
Pagination anchors contain leftover Rhymix template attributes (||cond=...); parse href attribute only
td.m_no is also the header class for the 조회 column; scope selectors to tbody rows
Recommend count unavailable in list; detail page header exposes only views and comments

sample_fixture_item.title: [샘플] 더쿠 핫게시판 목록 파싱 픽스처 제목
